summary: Chinese entrepreneur, teacher, Smartisan founder and livestream icon fighting with hammers, lectures, and debt-clearing stubbornness.

idle.startPose: Arms folded, chin high, glasses gleaming with stubborn confidence.
idle.endPose: One hand adjusts glasses, foot tapping impatiently.
idle.motion: Chest rises proudly; glasses flash as he shifts weight.
idle.flavor: He silently judges your product roadmap before punching it.

walk.startPose: Leans forward, one hand holding an invisible microphone.
walk.endPose: Steps wide, palm open like pitching a miracle phone.
walk.motion: Marches with salesman rhythm, shoulders bouncing between persuasion and challenge.
walk.flavor: Every step feels like a livestream discount countdown.

attack1.startPose: Raises a polished Smartisan hammer beside his shoulder.
attack1.endPose: Hammer snaps forward, wrist locked in righteous certainty.
attack1.motion: A short explosive swing cuts straight through the opponent's argument.
attack1.flavor: The hit lands with pure '彪悍的人生不需要解释' energy.

attack2.endPose: Palm thrusts outward like closing a brutal debate.
attack2.motion: Words become shockwaves as his torso twists into the strike.
attack2.flavor: He fact-checks your guard so hard it needs after-sales service.

intro.startPose: Stands calmly, holding a tiny product launch clicker.
intro.endPose: Spreads arms, presenting himself like premium hardware.
intro.motion: Clicks once, bows slightly, then snaps into fighting stance.
intro.flavor: He promises this comeback ships before the next apology livestream.

death.startPose: Staggers backward, glasses crooked, hammer slipping down.
death.endPose: Kneels dramatically, one hand still raised for explanation.
death.motion: Falls slowly, resisting defeat like an unpaid debt schedule.
death.flavor: A tiny receipt reads: '真还传, final episode postponed.'

super.startPose: Plants feet wide, hammer raised, microphone in other hand.
super.endPose: Finishes pointing upward, surrounded by flying order receipts.
super.motion: Delivers rapid lecture strikes, then launches a giant Smartisan hammer wave.
super.flavor: He clears your health bar like clearing six hundred million yuan.
